name: Sesame Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the egg yolk with 1 teaspoon of water.
2. Preheat oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit. Line 2 cookie sheets with parchment paper.
3. Prepare sesame seeds: Reserve 1/4 cup for garnish, coarsely grind the remaining seeds.
4. Combine ground sesame seeds, sifted flour, baking powder, and baking soda in a bowl.
5. In a mixing bowl, cream shortening and sugar until fluffy.
6. Add eggs one at a time and beat until smooth after each addition.
7. Add vanilla and stir to combine.
8. Add dry ingredients to the creamed mixture gradually and mix until well combined. The dough will be moist and may pull away from the sides of the bowl.
9. Dust a work surface with about 1/4 cup flour. Knead the dough to form a smooth ball.
10. To shape each cookie, roll about 1 tablespoon of dough into a ball.
11. Press lightly with the palm of your hand onto the cookie sheets.
12. Place cookies 3 inches apart on the cookie sheets; freeze for 20 minutes.
13. Brush cookies with egg wash.
14. Press reserved sesame seeds into the dough.
15. Bake for 15-20 minutes or until lightly browned. Remove and allow to cool.
16. Store in an airtight cookie tin for up to 2 weeks. Makes 50 cookies.
